calibration_sets.name: BR_Hsal_BACR_literature_seed
calibration_sets.source: BR calibration seeds: PMID:7819500; DOI:10.1006/jmbi.1997.1204; DOI:10.4161/bioe.21048; DOI:10.1021/bi00226a016; DOI:10.3390/ijms150202516; full-sequence indexing shift +13 applied for UniProt P02945.

known_useful.label: D85N
known_useful.note: D85N red-shift / inverted proton translocation evidence Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98.

known_useful.label: D85T
known_useful.note: D85T red-shift / chloride and proton transport mode change Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98.

known_useful.label: D85S
known_useful.note: D85S red-shift to about 609 nm in BR mutant study Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98.

known_useful.label: D85V
known_useful.note: D85V slight blue shift in BR mutant study Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98.

known_useful.label: D85N_D96N
known_useful.note: double mutant with altered spectral and transport behavior Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98, 96->109.

known_useful.label: D85E_D96Q
known_useful.note: photochromic BR mutant used for Q photoproduct characterization Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 85->98, 96->109.

known_neutral.label: D96N
known_neutral.note: proton donor mutation; useful as non-pocket functional control for scoring Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 96->109.

known_neutral.label: R82Q
known_neutral.note: pH/pumping mutant control from BR purification and pH-dependence literature Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 82->95.

known_disruptive.label: K216A
known_disruptive.note: retinal Schiff-base lysine substitution; expected chromophore-binding disruption Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 216->229.

known_disruptive.label: K216G
known_disruptive.note: retinal Schiff-base lysine substitution; expected chromophore-binding disruption Full-sequence index used for pipeline matching; mature BR mapping 216->229.

known_useful.label: E123T
known_useful.note: ChETA fast kinetics, reduced current tradeoff

known_useful.label: E123T_H134R
known_useful.note: combined fast kinetics and increased current variant used in circuit studies

known_useful.label: D156A
known_useful.note: DC gate mutation affecting closing kinetics

known_neutral.label: H134K
known_neutral.note: conservative charge mutation placeholder; review before scoring use

known_neutral.label: T159S
known_neutral.note: nearby polar substitution control; review before scoring use
